markdown:
# Heavy Precipitation

Everything within an area of heavy rain or heavy snowfall is [[lightly_obscured Obscured]], and creatures in the area have [[disadvantage]] on all Wisdom ([[perception]]) checks. Heavy rain also extinguishes open flames.
